parameters.query: SELECT o.id, o.opp_title, o.agency, o.level_1, o.level_2, o.gda_score, o.gda_label, o.estimated_value, o.response_deadline, o.stage, o.set_aside, o.naics_code, o.incumbent_analysis, o.likely_competitors, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gda_capture_plans cp WHERE cp.opp_id = o.id) AS has_capture_plan FROM gda_opportunity_tracker o WHERE o.gda_label IN ('PURSUE','EVALUATE') ORDER BY o.gda_score DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT id, opp_title, agency, level_1, gda_score, gda_label, estimated_value, response_deadline, stage, set_aside, naics_code, likely_competitors FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE gda_score >= 40 ORDER BY gda_score DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT date, metric_name, metric_value, rolling_avg_7d, delta_1d FROM daily_trends ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 90

INSERT INTO intelligence_log (source, query, result, created_at) VALUES ('predictive-intel', 'dashboard', '{{ JSON.stringify($json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb, NOW()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING id

SELECT date, metric_name, metric_value, rolling_avg_7d, delta_1d, delta_7d FROM daily_trends WHERE date >= COALESCE(NULLIF($1, ''), NULLIF($1, 'undefined'), (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days')::TEXT)::DATE AND date <= COALESCE(NULLIF($2, ''), NULLIF($2, 'undefined'), CURRENT_DATE::TEXT)::DATE ORDER BY date ASC, metric_name ASC

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', action: 'trends', data: $input.all().map(function(i) { return i.json; }), count: $input.all().length }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid action. Use: predictive, trends' }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({model:'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',max_tokens:4096,system:'You are a Shipley-trained defense acquisition analyst for Georgetown Defense Analytics (GDA). Generate predictive intelligence from real pipeline data provided. Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no preamble.',messages:[{role:'user',content:$json.prompt}]}) }}
